mapper.select: select cast(id as varchar) as id, email, password_hash, display_name, enabled, email_verified, created_at, updated_at from users where lower(email) = lower(#{email})
select cast(id as varchar) as id, email, password_hash, display_name, enabled, email_verified, created_at, updated_at from users where id = cast(#{id} as uuid)
mapper.insert: insert into users (id, email, password_hash, display_name) values (cast(#{id} as uuid), #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName})
